name: vibestack
description: Self-hosted platform for deploying AI-generated web applications.
author: Dendrix AI

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @vibestack/shared && npm run build --workspace @vibestack/api && npm run build --workspace @vibestack/web --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @vibestack/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @vibestack/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @vibestack/web --if-present
